节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Sequential gesture recognition is performed in sequence according to the gesture registration sequence.
Simultaneous recognition. Registration gestures participate in recognition. Everything can be triggered.
Mutually exclusive recognition. Only one gesture is successfully recognized.

High-priority response to the current gesture.When the current gesture fails to be recognized, other gesture responses are triggered.For gestures with the same priority, responses are performed based on the recognition sequence.
Ignore internal gestures and recognize the current gesture first.
The system gesture determination is not affected.
The user-defined gesture determination result of the current component is fail.
The flag whether it is a system gesture.
The location info used in gesture event.
X-axis coordinates relative to the upper left corner of the component.
Y-axis coordinates relative to the upper left corner of the component.
X-axis coordinates relative to the upper left corner of the window.
Y-axis coordinates relative to the upper left corner of the window.
X-axis coordinates relative to the upper left corner of the screen.
Y-axis coordinates relative to the upper left corner of the screen.
X position of the click point relative to the global display coordinate.
Y position of the click point relative to the global display coordinate.
X coordinate of the touch point relative to the left edge of the device screen.
The Y coordinate of the touch point relative to the upper edge of the device screen.
X coordinate of the touch point relative to the left edge of the touched element.
Y coordinate of the touch point relative to the upper edge of the touched element.
X coordinate of the touch point relative to the left edge of the device screen.
Y coordinate of the touch point relative to the upper edge of the device screen.
All finger information when the gesture event is triggered, the return value is one array, and the array length is just the total fingers count.
Defines event info for tap gesture.
The tap location info used in tap gesture.
Defines event info for long press gesture.
Indicates whether an event is triggered repeatedly.
Defines event info for pan gesture.
Gesture event offset X. The unit is vp.
Gesture event offset Y. The unit is vp.
Defines event info for pinch gesture.
X-axis coordinate of the kneading center point. The unit is vp.
Y-axis coordinate of the kneading center point. The unit is vp.
Defines event info for rotation gesture.
Gesture event direction angle. The unit is deg.
Defines event info for swipe gesture.
Gesture event direction angle. The unit is deg.
Gesture event slide speed. The unit is vp.
Indicates whether an event is triggered repeatedly. Used in LongPressGesture.
All finger information. Used in LongPressGesture and TapGesture.
All finger information when the gesture event is triggered, the return value is one array, and the array length is just the total fingers count.
Gesture event offset X. The unit is vp. Used in PanGesture.
Gesture event offset Y. The unit is vp. Used in PanGesture.
Gesture event direction angle. The unit is deg. Used in RotationGesture and SwipeGesture.
Gesture event slide speed. The unit is vp. Used in SwipeGesture.
X-axis coordinate of the kneading center point. The unit is vp. Used in PinchGesture.
Y-axis coordinate of the kneading center point. The unit is vp. Used in PinchGesture.
The tap location info used in tap gesture.
Input source type for gesture response.
注释信息: @param { Array<SourceTool> } types - indicate the allowed input source for gesture to response

parameters.说明: indicate the allowed input source for gesture to response

节点.功能描述: The flag to strict verification fingers, if touch finger size is over or less than fingers, gesture can not be accepted. The default value is false.
Input source type for gesture response.
注释信息: @param { Array<SourceTool> } types - indicate the allowed input source for gesture to response

parameters.说明: indicate the allowed input source for gesture to response

节点.功能描述: Number of consecutive clicks recognized. If the value is less than 1 or null, the default value is used.
The hand index that triggers the click. If the value is less than 1, the default value is used.
The limited move distance of click. If the value is less than 0, the default value is used.
Set the value. TapGestureParameters: The parameters of the tapGesture.

节点.签名: (value?: { fingers?: number; direction?: PanDirection; distance?: number } | PanGestureOptions): PanGestureInterface
节点.功能描述: Set the value. fingers: Indicates the hand index that triggers the pangesture. direction: Indicates the direction that triggers the pangesture. distance: Indicates the distance that triggers the pangesture.
注释信息: @param { { fingers?: number; direction?: PanDirection; distance?: number } | PanGestureOptions } value

节点.功能描述: Callback when the Pan gesture is moving.
The Pan gesture is successfully recognized. When the finger is lifted, the callback is triggered.
The Pan gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received.
The Pan gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received.
Input source type for gesture response.
注释信息: @param { Array<SourceTool> } types - indicate the allowed input source for gesture to response

parameters.说明: indicate the allowed input source for gesture to response

节点.功能描述: The LongPress gesture is successfully recognized. When the finger is lifted, the callback is triggered.
The LongPress gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received.
The LongPress gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received. Add GestureEvent in cancel callback.
Callback when the Pan gesture is moving.
The Pan gesture is successfully recognized. When the finger is lifted, the callback is triggered.
The Pan gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received.
The Pan gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received. Add GestureEvent in cancel callback.
Callback when the Pinch gesture is moving.
The Pinch gesture is successfully recognized. When the finger is lifted, the callback is triggered.
The Pinch gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received.
The Pinch gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received. Add GestureEvent in cancel callback.
Callback when the Rotation gesture is moving.
The Rotation gesture is successfully recognized. When the finger is lifted, the callback is triggered.
The Rotation gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received.
The Rotation gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received. Add GestureEvent in cancel callback.
The GestureGroup gesture is successfully recognized and a callback is triggered when the touch cancel event is received.
Returns whether the scrollable component is at begin.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } - true is at begin, false is not at begin
节点.return_description: - true is at begin, false is not at begin

节点.功能描述: Returns whether the scrollable component is at end.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } - true is at end, false is not at end
节点.return_description: - true is at end, false is not at end

注释信息: @returns { string } - the inspector id of the component
节点.return_description: - the inspector id of the component

节点.功能描述: Returns the event target information of the component.
注释信息: @returns { EventTargetInfo } - the event target information of the component.
节点.return_description: - the event target information of the component.

节点.功能描述: Dispatch touch cancel to the touch recognizer.

节点.return_description: - the gesture's tag
- the gesture's type

节点.功能描述: Returns whether the gesture recognizer is built in recognizer.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } - true is built in recognizer, false is not built in recognizer
节点.return_description: - true is built in recognizer, false is not built in recognizer

节点.功能描述: set the enabled state of the gesture recognizer.
注释信息: @param { boolean } isEnabled - Indicates the enabled state.

节点.功能描述: Returns whether the gesture recognizer is enabled.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } - true is enabled, false is not enabled
节点.return_description: - true is enabled, false is not enabled
- the gesture recognizer's state

节点.功能描述: Returns the event target information of the component.
注释信息: @returns { EventTargetInfo } - the event target information of the component.
节点.return_description: - the event target information of the component.

节点.功能描述: Returns whether the gesture recognizer is valid.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } - true is valid, false is invalid
节点.return_description: - true is valid, false is invalid

节点.功能描述: Returns the tap gesture's finger count.
注释信息: @returns { number } - the finger count of the tap gesture.
节点.return_description: - the finger count of the tap gesture.

注释信息: @returns { boolean } - the limitFingerCount of the tap gesture.
节点.return_description: - the limitFingerCount of the tap gesture.

节点.功能描述: Prevent the gesture recognizer from participating in this gesture recognition until all fingers are lifted. If the system has already made out the result of this gesture recognizer (success and failure), calling this function will have no any effect. [Note]: This method is different from GestureRecognizer.setEnabled(isEnabled: boolean), setEnabled does not prevent a gesture recognizer object from participating in the gesture recognition process, but only affects whether the gesture's corresponding callback function is executed.

注释信息: @returns { number } - the count of the tap gesture.
节点.return_description: - the count of the tap gesture.

节点.功能描述: Defines the long press gesture recognizer.
Returns the long press gesture's repeat state.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } - the repeat state of the long press gesture.
节点.return_description: - the repeat state of the long press gesture.

节点.功能描述: Returns the long press gesture's duration. The unit is ms.
注释信息: @returns { number } - the duration of the long press gesture.
节点.return_description: - the duration of the long press gesture.

节点.功能描述: Returns the swipe gesture's speed. The unit is vp/s.
注释信息: @returns { number } - the velocity threshold of the swipe gesture.
节点.return_description: - the velocity threshold of the swipe gesture.

注释信息: @returns { SwipeDirection } - the direction of the swipe gesture.
节点.return_description: - the direction of the swipe gesture.

节点.功能描述: Returns the pinch gesture's distance. The unit is vp.
注释信息: @returns { number } - the distance of the pinch gesture.
节点.return_description: - the distance of the pinch gesture.

注释信息: @returns { number } - the angle of the rotation gesture.
节点.return_description: - the angle of the rotation gesture.

节点.功能描述: Returns the the pan gesture options of the recognizer.
节点.return_description: - Pan gesture options

节点.功能描述: Returns the pan recognizer's direction attribute.
节点.return_description: - Pan recognizer direction

节点.功能描述: Returns the pan recognizer's distance. The unit is vp.
注释信息: @returns { number } - the distance of the pan recognizer.
节点.return_description: - the distance of the pan recognizer.

节点.功能描述: Returns the pan recognizer's distance map. The unit is vp.
注释信息: @returns { Map<SourceTool, number> } - the distance map of the pan recognizer.
节点.return_description: - the distance map of the pan recognizer.
